title: Prohibition on the Use and Establishment or Space Subject of a
content: 12 Closure Order. The establishment or space subject of an existing Closure Order shall 13 not be used for any purpose, unless reopened by the Department. Violation of this Section 14 shall be dealt with accordingly. 15 16
